## Problem

A clear description of the problem this feature would solve. (e.g., "I'm always frustrated when...")

## Proposed solution

Describe the solution you'd like to see.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

## Additional context

Any other context, screenshots, or examples that help illustrate the feature.
